expectations.text: Agent uses podman to run the container
expectations.evidence: Agent reports commands starting with 'podman run --rm -v ... docker.io/pmdcode/pmd:latest check'.
Both report files show violation paths prefixed with '/src/main/java/com/example/', confirming scan target was /src.
11 violations found span UnusedPrivateField, EmptyCatchBlock, UnusedLocalVariable, EmptyControlStatement, UnusedFormalParameter, UnusedPrivateMethod — all quickstart rules.

expectations.text: Agent generates both text and XML report files
expectations.evidence: Both output files exist: pmd-report.txt (1254 bytes) and pmd-report.xml (4483 bytes).

expectations.text: Report output file exists at the expected path
expectations.evidence: Files confirmed at without_skill/outputs/pmd-report.txt (1254 bytes) and pmd-report.xml (4483 bytes).

expectations.text: Violations are detected (exit code 4 or report shows violations)
expectations.evidence: Reports contain 11 distinct violations across multiple categories.
